title: tanacetopsis setacea
intro: Tanacetopsis setacea, also known as the 'Alpine tansy', is a flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae) that is native to the high-altitude regions of the Himalayas. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Tanacetopsis setacea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an insect repellent, making it a valuable herb for various health concerns. Tanacetopsis setacea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or essential oils, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
